37.reason: [Loop condition should be p >= 0 but list3[k] is uninitialized when p == k; also, loop should run from k-1 down to 0]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Loop condition should be p >= 0 but list3[k] is uninitialized when p == k; also, loop should run from k-1 down to 0]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Loop condition should be p >= 0 but list3[k] is uninitialized when p == k; also loop runs one extra time accessing list3[-1] when k=0]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Loop condition 'p >= 0' causes out-of-bounds access when p == k because list3[k] is uninitialized and the valid indices are 0 to k-1. Also, when k == 0, p starts at 0 and then decrements to -1, causing invalid memory access.]
